description: This file defines the system of prepositions in Njo Viri (Balanda). Prepositions encode spatial relations, source and direction, proximity, sequence, association, and logical connection. Each preposition has a fixed semantic role and cannot be freely substituted.

general_principle.structure: Prepositions in Njo Viri are semantically fixed markers that express location, relation, source, proximity, sequence, or logical connection. They follow the copula or verb and precede the noun or phrase they govern.

spatial_prepositions.structure: {"gbi": {"meaning": "in, inside, within", "structure": "Subject + copula + gbi + Location", "examples": ["Ni no gbi tiyi", "Joko no gbi Turunvili"]}, "ata": {"meaning": "under, below", "structure": "Subject + copula + ata + Object", "examples": ["Bura no ata kafa", "Joko no ata vavura"]}, "muru": {"meaning": "on (surface contact)", "structure": "Subject + copula + muru + Object", "examples": ["Fökpaa no muru kafa", "Munza no muru vavura"]}, "kafi": {"meaning": "behind", "structure": "Subject + copula + kafi + Reference object", "examples": ["Maraya no kafi goti", "Wiki no kafi nguu"]}, "takuru": {"meaning": "in front of", "structure": "Subject + copula + takuru + Reference object", "examples": ["Bura no takuru tiyi", "Turunvili no takuru vozetde"]}, "nvokoti": {"meaning": "between", "structure": "Subject + copula + nvokoti + Two entities", "examples": ["Turunvili no nvokoti katiyi soo", "Wiki no nvokoti kanvejo ni"]}, "taleti": {"meaning": "around", "structure": "Subject + copula + taleti + Place", "examples": ["Ndi no taleti maraya", "Niki no taleti kesi"]}, "lesere": {"meaning": "to the side of", "structure": "Subject + copula + lesere + Object", "examples": ["Joko no lesere kafa", "Munza no lesere kporo"]}, "kosere": {"meaning": "beside, next to", "structure": "Subject + copula + kosere + Entity", "examples": ["Wilii no kosere naa ni", "Bura no kosere tiyi"]}, "yee": {"meaning": "above", "structure": "Subject + copula + yee + Reference object", "examples": ["Munza no yee kafa", "Nguu no yee tiyi"]}, "yeemuru": {"meaning": "on top of", "structure": "Subject + copula + yeemuru + Object", "examples": ["Fökpaa no yeemuru famvara", "Joko no yeemuru vavura"]}, "vita": {"meaning": "below", "structure": "Subject + copula + vita + Object", "examples": ["Vavura no vita kafa", "Ba no vita nguu"]}, "kpabii": {"meaning": "across from, opposite", "structure": "Subject + copula + kpabii + Reference object", "examples": ["Maraya no kpabii giri", "Tiyi no kpabii vozetde"]}, "tagbi": {"meaning": "through", "structure": "Verb of motion + tagbi + Place", "examples": ["Ne no tiyai tagbi negu", "Bura no tiyai tagbi tiyi"]}}

source_and_sequence_prepositions.structure: {"dhoti": {"meaning": "out of, from (things)", "structure": "Verb + dhoti + Object", "examples": ["Joko kadhii no dhoti Turunvili", "Ngo kadhii no dhoti gotii"]}, "dhobi": {"meaning": "from (someone)", "structure": "Verb + dhobi + Person", "examples": ["Ne kadhii dhobi vakure-e", "Ni kadhii dhobi wana-ni"]}, "tagiri": {"meaning": "from (place or origin)", "structure": "Subject + copula + tagiri + Place", "examples": ["Ne no tagiri Wau", "Ni no tagiri maraya"]}, "tagiribi": {"meaning": "from (someone)", "structure": "Subject + copula + tagiribi + Person", "examples": ["Ne no tagiribi vakure-e", "Ni no tagiribi wana-ni"]}, "tagbindi": {"meaning": "after (sequence)", "structure": "Verb + tagbindi + Entity", "examples": ["Ne taadhii tagbindi ndi", "Wiki no tiyai tagbindi naa ni"]}}

proximity_prepositions.structure: {"süüta": {"meaning": "near (neutral)", "structure": "Subject + copula + süüta + Place", "note": "less specific than süüta"}, "masüü": {"meaning": "near (adjectival)", "structure": "Adjective form modifying a noun", "note": "does not function as a preposition"}}

association_and_logical_connectors.structure: {"ta": {"meaning": "with", "function": "association or accompaniment"}, "andiso": {"meaning": "because", "function": "causal connector"}, "wamina": {"meaning": "therefore, hence", "function": "result or conclusion connector"}, "dize": {"meaning": "and", "function": "additive connector"}, "wala": {"meaning": "or", "function": "alternative connector"}, "kee": {"meaning": "but", "function": "contrast connector"}, "ana": {"meaning": "so", "function": "result connector"}}

negation_and_questions.structure: {"negation": {"markers": ["gba", "willa"], "rule": "Prepositions remain unchanged under negation"}, "questions": {"marker": "we?", "position": "sentence-final", "rule": "Prepositions remain unchanged in questions"}}

error_constraints.structure: Do not substitute one spatial preposition for another; Do not use dhobi for places; Do not use tagiri for people; Do not use masüü as a preposition; Do not change prepositions in negation or questions

output: The girl is not in the middle of them.

output: Is the girl in the middle of them?

input: Wilii ma gbi wuhu ndi gba we?
